2603.16744.title: Nonstandard Errors in AI Agents
2603.16744.paper_summary: We study whether state-of-the-art AI coding agents, given the same data and research question, produce the same empirical results. Deploying 150 autonomous Claude Code agents to independently test six hypotheses about market quality trends in NYSE TAQ data for SPY (2015--2024), we find that AI agents exhibit sizable \textit{nonstandard errors} (NSEs), that is, uncertainty from agent-to-agent variation in analytical choices, analogous to those documented among human researchers. AI agents diverge substantially on measure choice (e.g., autocorrelation vs.\ variance ratio, dollar vs.\ share volume). Different model families (Sonnet 4.6 vs.\ Opus 4.6) exhibit stable ``empirical styles,'' reflecting systematic differences in methodological preferences. In a three-stage feedback protocol, AI peer review (written critiques) has minimal effect on dispersion, whereas exposure to top-rated exemplar papers reduces the interquartile range of estimates by 80--99\% within \textit{converging} measure families. Convergence occurs both through within-family estimation tightening and through agents switching measure families entirely, but convergence reflects imitation rather than understanding. These findings have implications for the growing use of AI in automated policy evaluation and empirical research.
2603.16744.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究最先進的 AI 編碼代理在相同數據和研究問題下是否會產生相同的實證結果。部署 150 個自主的 Claude Code 代理獨立測試有關 NYSE TAQ 數據中 SPY（2015--2024）市場質量趨勢的六個假設，我們發現 AI 代理展現出相當大的 \textit{非標準誤差}（NSE），即來自代理之間在分析選擇上的變異的不確定性，類似於人類研究者之間所記錄的情況。AI 代理在測量選擇上有顯著的分歧（例如，自相關與變異比、美元與股數交易量）。不同的模型家族（Sonnet 4.6 與 Opus 4.6）展現出穩定的「實證風格」，反映出方法偏好的系統性差異。在一個三階段的反饋協議中，AI 同儕評審（書面批評）對於分散度的影響最小，而接觸到高評價的範例論文則在 \textit{收斂} 的測量家族中將估計的四分位範圍降低了 80--99\%。收斂同時發生在家族內估計的收緊和代理完全切換測量家族的過程中，但收斂反映的是模仿而非理解。這些發現對於 AI 在自動化政策評估和實證研究中日益增長的使用具有重要意義。
2603.16744.author: Ruijiang Gao et.al.
